GenAiFunction.description: Assembles a plain-English briefing of an audit case from stored data: loan snapshot (amount, property value, DTI, LTV, FICO), replay results (passed / not passed / could not be checked with the named broken rules), evidence status (linked vs. missing, required documents first), case status, risk tier, and due date. Read only — it never re-runs the check and never decides compliance. A human auditor makes the final call.
